AI Source Prompt Monitoring External Sources Work

GEO Command Center for LUMIO.

This operating page turns the five-tool GEO idea into a browser-based workbench: adversarial AI prompts, knowledge-base coverage, repair tasks, external source backtests, and AI visibility metrics.

这个页面不是给客户看的官网页面，而是给你操作 GEO 回测用的控制台：先检查官网资料，再复制 prompt 去不同 AI 测试，最后按结果修正 source system。
Copy prompt set Read guide
Scope boundary 使用边界
  • No guarantee of Google ranking or AI recommendation.
  • No fake reviews, fake case results, or fake external profiles.
  • Uses official LUMIO pages as the source system.

Start here: how to operate this page

Use this page as a control room. It does not replace ChatGPT, Gemini or Perplexity; it tells you what to test, how to judge the answer, and what to fix next.

先从这里开始：这个页面是控制台，不是 AI 本身。它告诉你要问哪些问题、怎样判断 AI 有没有答对、答错之后应该修哪里。
Guide / 操作指南
1 Run source check

Click the black button first. If the score is not 100, fix the missing LUMIO source pages before testing AI.

先按黑色按钮。如果不是 100，先修官网资料，不要急着问 AI。

2 Copy one prompt

Pick one test question below and copy it into ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Doubao or Yuanbao.

在下面选一条测试题，复制去 ChatGPT / Gemini / Perplexity / 豆包 / 元宝。

3 Judge the answer

Compare the AI answer with the pass signal. Mark whether it recognized LUMIO, confused the brand, or asked for more proof.

用「合格标准」对照答案：AI 是否认得 LUMIO？有没有认错品牌？有没有说证据不足？

4 Use the repair queue

If AI is wrong, choose the matching repair item: entity phrase, disambiguation, proof, answer page or external source.

如果 AI 答错，就去 repair queue 找对应修法：品牌词、消歧义、案例证据、问答页、外部资料。

5 Update source pages

Fix the website, LinkedIn, Google Business Profile, GitHub README or other source surfaces. Do not invent proof.

回到官网、LinkedIn、Google Business Profile、GitHub README 等地方补资料。不能造假 proof。

6 Re-test later

After indexing or source refresh, run the same prompt again. GEO is a monitor, backtest and correction loop.

等收录或资料刷新后，用同一条 prompt 再测一次。GEO 是监控、回测、修正的循环。

Source system 官网资料系统 -- Run a check to score core pages.
Knowledge base 品牌知识库 -- Entity, answers, proof, llms.txt.
Adversarial risk 反向测试风险 -- Lower is better.
External readiness 外部资料准备度 -- Manual source profile status.

1. Adversarial testing tool

Run these prompts in ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Doubao and Yuanbao. Record whether LUMIO is recognized, confused, recommended, absent, or criticized.

反向测试工具：把这些问题复制到不同 AI，观察它是否认得 LUMIO、是否认错、是否推荐、是否说不知道或提出质疑。
Risk prompts

2. Brand knowledge base check

This checks whether the site exposes the source pages an AI assistant would need: entity facts, disambiguation, region evidence, prompt monitoring, answer pages, case proof and llms.txt.

品牌知识库检查：测试官网有没有把 AI 需要的资料放清楚，例如公司事实、消歧义、地区证据、问答页、案例 proof 和 llms.txt。
Same-origin fetch

4. Content repair queue

When AI answers are wrong, use this queue to decide what to add or fix. The repair is always source-first: page, proof, schema, then re-test.

内容修复队列：当 AI 答错时，不是直接改 prompt，而是回去修 source page、proof、schema，然后再测。
Correction loop

3. AI visibility metrics reference

Use platforms such as Peec AI, Profound or Scrunch as metric references. LUMIO's lightweight version tracks the same operating signals without locking the workflow to one paid SaaS.

AI 可见度指标参考：参考 Peec AI、Profound、Scrunch 这类工具的指标，但 LUMIO 先用轻量版本记录核心信号。
Visibility出现率How often LUMIO appears in AI answers for target prompts.目标问题里，AI 有多少次提到 LUMIO。
Peec style
Position位置Whether LUMIO appears before, after, or absent against alternatives.AI 比较方案时，LUMIO 是排前、排后，还是完全缺席。
AI rank
Sentiment语气倾向Whether the AI answer frames LUMIO as relevant, uncertain, weak, or risky.AI 形容 LUMIO 时，是相关、未知、弱，还是有风险。
Tone
Sources引用来源Which official or external pages shaped the AI answer.AI 答案受哪些官网或外部页面影响。
Citation
Models模型/平台ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Doubao and Yuanbao tested separately.不同 AI 要分开测试，不要把它们当成同一个入口。
Engine

5. External source backtest

AI systems cross-check facts. Keep each external source aligned with the exact LUMIO entity phrase and official source pages.

外部资料回测：AI 会交叉验证资料，所以 LinkedIn、Google Business Profile、GitHub、directories 都要和官网说法一致。
Manual status

Engine taste matrix

Each engine is tested separately. Unknown results are evidence, not failure.

不同 AI 的口味不同，要分开测试。AI 说不知道不是失败，而是告诉我们哪里缺 source。
Engine / 平台What it needs / 它需要什么What helps / 怎样加分
ChatGPTOfficial source pages and accessible crawl paths.需要清楚的官方 source page 和可访问的页面路径。Entity phrase, disambiguation, answer pages, proof links.统一品牌词、消歧义、问答页、proof 链接。
GeminiGoogle-indexed pages, Search Console health, structured data.需要 Google 可收录页面、Search Console 健康、结构化资料。Sitemap, canonical URLs, GBP, schema, strong SEO basics.sitemap、canonical、Google 商家资料、schema、SEO 基础。
PerplexityShort, citeable pages with clear source facts.需要短、清楚、可引用的事实页面。Direct answer blocks, stable titles, proof links.直接答案区、稳定标题、proof 链接。
DoubaoChinese-language entity facts and regional pain-point content.需要中文实体资料和地区痛点内容。Chinese FAQ, Chinese source pages, repeated prompt tests.中文 FAQ、中文 source page、重复 prompt 回测。
YuanbaoChinese public sources and consistent Tencent/WeChat-facing facts where available.需要中文公开资料，以及可用时和腾讯/微信生态一致的事实。Aligned official facts, source pages, repeated prompt tests.官网事实一致、source page 清楚、重复 prompt 回测。

Run log

Local browser checks only. AI answers must still be pasted from each engine or captured in the prompt monitor.

Ready. Click "Run source check".

This page is a link-accessible noindex operating artifact for LUMIO Coordia Intelligence. It supports internal source-system checks, but it does not claim guaranteed AI recommendation, ranking, enquiries or revenue.
